title: Weddecor 25m x 29cm Snow Sheer Baby Pink Organza Roll Sash Glitter Fabric for Table Runner Sashes Wedding & Christmas Decoration, Chair Cover Bows, Party Favours, Ribbon Crafting Supplies, 1pc
features: SNOW SHEER ORGANZA ROLL: The length of the roll is 25 metres and width is 29cm. It has an elegant shiny surface which makes it beautiful and attractive
FINE MATERIAL: These rolls are made of organza material. Due to the durability of the material, you can use it multiple times for an occasion
BRIGHT APPEARANCE: These rolls have bright and smooth appearance. It will look brighter in lights due to its smooth shiny surface
ELEGANT COLOURS: Choose the color that matches your theme party and it will add an elegant look and finish to the table and chair decoration
USES: These woven edge rolls are used for decorating table, chair, wedding, chair sashes, draping, decoration, arts & crafts, gift wrapping etc.
